rationale: This variant introduces a digit swap in followers count, a trailing zero error in statuses count, and a bit flip for the geo-enabled flag. These changes represent common data recording mistakes.
This variant applies a digit removal error to the friends count and an off-by-one error to the description length. These changes simulate simple data entry mistakes.

This variant introduces a digit duplication in followers count, a magnitude error in friends count, and a leading zero in listed count. This combination of errors simulates a variety of potential data corruption issues.
